source_pr.title: server: fix data race in TestIssue33699
source_pr.body:

symptoms: server: fix data race in TestIssue33699
failure_signature: server: fix data race in TestIssue33699
root_cause_explanation: `TestIssue33699` exercised concurrent operations on `clientConn`: one goroutine could call `ShowProcess()` (reading session context), while another path (e.g. `ComChangeUser`) recreated or cleared the same `TiDBContext`. Accessing `cc.ctx` without synchronization caused a data race. This PR stabilizes it by guarding the context field with a lock and using accessor methods (`getCtx`/`setCtx`) to synchronize reads/writes.
fix_pattern: Protect shared connection/session context (`cc.ctx`) with proper synchronization (e.g. RWMutex + accessor methods) when accessed from multiple goroutines.
